image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: The universe is expanding faster than ever — but why?
Context visual: Cosmologists use the term dark energy to describe this mysterious force.
Escalation visual: It's not just a name. Dark energy could make up about 70% of the universe.
Evidence visual: Recent studies hint at its influence on cosmic structures and fate.
Payoff visual: Yet, we barely understand what it really is or how it works.
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into the mysteries of the cosmos? Hit follow for more!
